title: What Jesus actually meant by leadership
caption:
The world gave you a definition of leadership built on status, volume, and control. Scripture gives you something different.

Jesus didn't manage from a distance. He washed feet. He was first into sacrifice, not first to the seat of honor. The one who wanted to be great had to become the servant of all.

That's not the leadership model your culture handed you. But it's the one that actually builds something worth following.

First into the cost. Last out the door. Authority earned by sacrifice — not seized by performance.

Save this for the man still trying to lead by demanding the room.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #scripture #manofgod #godlymen #discipleship #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
